title: Client Save Path — X-Company-Id header fix (Task 68B.4 leftover, blocks 68B.5.1 closure)
scope: Single-file PATCH on components/clients/ClientForm.tsx. Adds X-Company-Id header to the SAVE fetch (line 256). This is the one naked fetch missed by the Task 68B.4 regex migration script because endpoint was a variable (const endpoint = isNew ? '...' : '...'). Blocks current Task 68B.5.1 Golden POST closure since proper supplier creation requires working Client save.
root_cause: ClientForm.tsx handleSave() uses const endpoint = isNew ? '/api/company/{cid}/clients' : '/api/company/{cid}/clients/{clientId}' — this variable indirection wasn't caught by the Task 68B.4 automatic regex migration that handled inline URL literals. LOAD (line 146) and DELETE (line 292) were caught because their URLs are direct literals. SAVE slipped through.
evidence: Dashka visual report: POST /api/company/{cid}/clients returns 400 COMPANY_CONTEXT_MISSING. Network tab shows Request Headers contain only Content-Type. Backend requireCompanyContext middleware requires X-Company-Id header.
fix: Add 'X-Company-Id': companyId to the headers object on line 256. Pattern identical to Task 68B.4 inline injection (proven safe 41 times).

checks.name: static — ClientForm has exactly 3 fetches with 3 X-Company-Id headers (parity restored)
checks.what: Total fetch() calls in ClientForm.tsx must equal X-Company-Id occurrences
checks.url: bash -c 'fc=$(grep -c "fetch(" components/clients/ClientForm.tsx); hc=$(grep -c "X-Company-Id" components/clients/ClientForm.tsx); echo "fetches=$fc headers=$hc (must be equal: 3=3)"'

checks.name: static — SAVE fetch (line ~256) carries the header
checks.what: The handleSave fetch with conditional POST/PATCH endpoint now includes X-Company-Id
checks.url: bash -c 'awk "/const endpoint = isNew/,/method,/" components/clients/ClientForm.tsx | grep -A 5 "fetch(endpoint" | grep -c "X-Company-Id"'

checks.name: static — global invariant still holds across app/ + components/
checks.what: Total fetches in app/ + components/ >= total X-Company-Id headers (handlers like handlePost have 2 fetches with 2 headers)
checks.url: bash -c 'fc=$(grep -rn "fetch.*api/company/" --include="*.tsx" --include="*.ts" app/ components/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l); hc=$(grep -rn "X-Company-Id" --include="*.tsx" --include="*.ts" app/ components/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l); echo "fetches=$fc headers=$hc (headers must be >= fetches)"'

checks.name: build — TypeScript scan clean
checks.what: Pure object literal addition — no type changes, no new imports
checks.url: echo 'SolarBox auto-runs this; expect ✅ No TypeScript errors'

checks.name: build — pnpm build green
checks.url: echo 'SolarBox auto-runs this; expect ✅ Build PASSED'

checks.url: echo 'manual: UI → Clients → New → fill required fields → Save — expect success message, no 400 error'

checks.name: runtime — Edit existing Client succeeds (regression check)
checks.what: Open existing Client → modify field → Save → no error
checks.url: echo 'manual: UI → Clients → click client → edit field → Save — expect success'

checks.name: GOLDEN POST chain — closes Task 68B.5.1
checks.what: After Client save works, create real supplier → use in Purchase → POST → status flips POSTED → snapshot fields populated → journal balanced → warehouse stock updated
checks.url: echo 'manual: full Golden POST sequence — see Task 68B.5.1 verification for SQL details'

not_included: Demo Generators (Generate Demo Client/Product/etc.) — Task 68B.6 (LOCKED until 68B.5.1 CLOSED)
Warehouse 0-units investigation — pending Client save fix first; may be cascade (DRAFT never POSTED due to missing supplier) or separate bug
diff_summary: +4 / -1 lines. ONE object literal change. Zero new abstractions. Zero new imports. Identical pattern to 41 other inline X-Company-Id injections from Task 68B.4.
